question: Map Handicap: EF (-1.5) vs ARCRED (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Eternal Fire and ARCRED in the CCT Europe Closed Qualifier: Series #13 Play-In, scheduled for January 17 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Eternal Fire" if Eternal Fire wins 2 or more maps than ARCRED in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "ARCRED".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Eternal Fire vs ARCRED (BO3) - CCT Europe Closed Qualifier: Series #13 Play-In

question: FC Porto vs. Gil Vicente FC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Primeira Liga game between FC Porto and Gil Vicente FC, scheduled for January 26 at 3:15 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Porto and Gil Vicente FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaportugal.pt. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

In the upcoming Primeira Liga game between FC Porto and Gil Vicente FC, scheduled for January 26 at 3:15 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Porto and Gil Vicente FC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

question: Series: Execration Kill Handicap (-5.5) vs PlayTime (+5.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between PlayTime and Execration in the ESL One Birmingham: Southeast Asia Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Execration" if Execration secures 6 or more kills than PlayTime in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "PlayTime".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 6°C or below on January 19?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 19 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 23°C or below on January 19?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 19 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ar/ezeiza/SAEZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Map Handicap: HERO (-1.5) vs paiN (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between paiN and Heroic in the BLAST Bounty Qualifier, scheduled for January 17 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic wins 2 or more maps than paiN in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "paiN".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: paiN vs Heroic (BO3) - BLAST Bounty Qualifier
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between paiN and Heroic in the BLAST Bounty Qualifier, scheduled for January 17 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "paiN" if paiN win the match against Heroic.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win the match against paiN.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.
